provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi spacecraft, visible hull texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, three-quarter view showing full ship profile, isolated on plain dark grey-black background with subtle star field, small science and survey ship with sensor dome on dorsal surface, steel blue hull with department markings and sample bay doors, robotic arm folded against starboard hull, modest engine, large viewport windows on observation deck, antenna clusters and probe launchers, hull covered in sensor equipment mounts, workhorse research vessel not sleek explorer
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, Star Wars, Star Trek, luxury yacht, multiple ships, busy background, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, video game screenshot, miniature model

judgment.explanation: Ship exterior with faction-appropriate hull design, wear, and construction.

assertions.rationale: Lighting reads correctly — warm upper-left with soft shadows
Palette is muted and dusty — no bright saturated colors
Full body, front-facing, plain background, correct fill
Colors muted and lived-in — no neon or bright saturated tones
Not generic sci-fi — reads as faction-specific and lived-in
